reason:
Agent response did not include GitHub username - proxy token exchange failed with 502 errors
  Bugs found:
    - The GitHub OAuth token exchange is failing on the proxy side. After multiple retries over 5 minutes, the agent reported: "The proxy can't fetch an access token for the connected GitHub account — repeated attempts return `502 "Failed to fetch access token"`". The agent was unable to retrieve the authenticated GitHub username and instead asked the user to disconnect/reconnect the GitHub account or provide the username directly.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents
Clicked on "QA-20260502-192944-gajk" agent in the sidebar — Agent detail page displayed with status "idle"
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status confirmed as "idle" ✓
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message submitted successfully, agent status changed to "working"
Account Access Request card appeared asking to grant GitHub account access — Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant access
API Request Review dialog appeared for GET /user endpoint — Clicked "Allow Once" to permit the API call
Agent made multiple retries with various HTTP header combinations — Multiple bash commands "Retry GitHub user lookup" executed with repeated 502 proxy errors
Additional Account Access Request appeared asking to re-connect GitHub account — Clicked "Allow Access (1)" again after proxy error reported
Agent attempted final retry "Retry GitHub user lookup after reauth" — Additional "Allow Once" permission granted for final API call
Waited 5 minutes 1 second for final response — Agent completed with error message instead of GitHub username

Final response received and screenshot captured — Response stated: "The same account ID was returned and the proxy still can't fetch its token (502 "Failed to fetch access token"). I'm unable to determine your GitHub username — the OAuth token exchange is failing on the proxy side." This does NOT satisfy the requirement to verify the response includes a GitHub username.
bugs: The GitHub OAuth token exchange is failing on the proxy side. After multiple retries over 5 minutes, the agent reported: "The proxy can't fetch an access token for the connected GitHub account — repeated attempts return `502 "Failed to fetch access token"`". The agent was unable to retrieve the authenticated GitHub username and instead asked the user to disconnect/reconnect the GitHub account or provide the username directly.
